items.question: Who performs treatments at MedSpa 501?
items.answer: Treatments are performed by our licensed team including physicians, nurse practitioners, physician associates, nurse injectors, and licensed aestheticians. Every treatment is matched to the right provider for your goals.

items.question: Do you offer consultations?
items.answer: Yes. New clients are encouraged to start with a consultation so we can understand your goals and recommend the right treatment plan. Book online or call (984) 336-0501.

items.question: What neuromodulators do you offer?
items.answer: We offer Botox, Xeomin, and Daxxify. Daxxify is our longest-lasting option with results typically lasting 6 months or more. All three are customized for natural results.

items.question: Do you offer memberships?
items.answer: Yes. We offer The Glow Collective memberships: GlowTox (quarterly neuromodulator treatments, $2,200/year) and SkinGlow (monthly skin treatments, $2,000/year). Both include 15% savings on skincare and require a 3-month minimum commitment.

items.question: Do you offer medical weight loss?
items.answer: Yes. We offer GLP-1 based medical weight loss programs supervised by our licensed providers including Dr. Josh Dobstaff, MD.

items.question: What is IV nutrient therapy?
items.answer: IV therapy delivers vitamins, minerals, and hydration directly into the bloodstream for full absorption. Our formulations are custom-designed in partnership with 501 Pharmacy.

items.question: What are your hours?
items.answer: Monday through Friday: 9am to 6pm. Saturday and Sunday: Closed.

items.question: Where are you located?
items.answer: 69 Knox Way, Suite 108, Chapel Hill, NC 27516.

items.question: How do I book?
items.answer: Book online through our Boulevard portal, call (984) 336-0501, or email hello@medspa501.com.
